nl_query: How many answer keys were approved per month?
failed_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', ak.created_at) AS month, COUNT(ak.id) AS approved_count
FROM   answer_key ak
WHERE  ak.status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;
